_comment: Golden vector for ava-saevm-core tests/golden.rs::golden::sae_block_hash (specs/11 §4.1). The SAE block hash is keccak256(RLP(header)) (a standard Ethereum block). These are the hashes of every block in the fixed 9-element chain (genesis at index 0, then 8 blocks built by the live VM builder in tests/golden.rs) — the core-side companion to blocks/block_hash.json. Frozen from the Rust pipeline itself (reth/alloy SealedBlock::seal_slow over the deterministic FakeBuilder linkage). Provenance: behavioral reference is Go vms/saevm/blocks/block.go; exact Go/geth byte parity is asserted by the M7.29 differential, not here.
